description: Wear these socks with trainers when you're working out or to keep your feet comfortable when wearing formal shoes.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Calf length socks in blackBranding on the foot region and cuffsMade of blended cotton knitElasticated cuffs for a good Fit with black tipsThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for a good fitSock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
